sessionStart.bash: cat "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/bootstrap-core-policy.md" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/bootstrap-execution-policy.md" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/bootstrap-guardrails.md" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/bootstrap-hitl-questioning.md" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/bootstrap-rosetta-files.md" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/plugin-files-mode.md" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/INDEX.md" && echo "" && echo "Rosetta Core Plugin Path: ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"
sessionStart.powershell: Get-Content -Raw -Path "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/bootstrap-core-policy.md", "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/bootstrap-execution-policy.md", "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/bootstrap-guardrails.md", "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/bootstrap-hitl-questioning.md", "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/bootstrap-rosetta-files.md", "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/plugin-files-mode.md", "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/INDEX.md"; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "Rosetta Core Plugin Path: ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"
